hero.headline: Engineering & Delivery. No compromise.
hero.subtitle: Quorexis supports tech teams in delivering their critical projects. QA, DevOps, Data — from strategy to production.

expertises.title: What we do. In practice.
expertises.intro: Three complementary areas of expertise, unified by a single delivery mindset.

qa.title: Quality Engineering
qa.description: Test strategy, automation, CI/CD integration. We don't test at the end. We build quality from the start.

devops.title: DevOps & Cloud
devops.description: Pipelines, infrastructure as code, observability, continuous deployment. Stable, reproducible environments — production-ready.

data.title: Data Engineering
data.description: Data pipelines, data quality, orchestration, governance. Reliable flows for reliable decisions.

approach.title: Our approach
approach.subtitle: A structured framework in three phases. Every engagement follows the same logic: understand, execute, sustain.

align.title: Align
align.description: We understand your context, constraints, and goals. No generic template. A precise framing before any execution.
activities: Audit of technical and organizational context
Scope definition, objectives, and success criteria
align.outcome: A validated framing and an intervention plan aligned with your real priorities.

deliver.title: Deliver
deliver.description: We work within your teams or independently. Tangible deliverables, short iterations, full visibility.
activities: Embedded in your teams or autonomous delivery
Short iterations with tangible deliverables every sprint
Continuous adjustment based on field feedback
deliver.outcome: Visible results within the first weeks, not at the end of the engagement.

industrialize.title: Industrialize
industrialize.description: We document, transfer knowledge, and ensure sustainability. The goal: it runs without us.
activities: Structured knowledge transfer to your teams
Implementation of maintenance and evolution processes
industrialize.outcome: Full autonomy. The practices and tools stay, even after we leave.

approach.credibility: Founded by Ahmed Ghanmi — over 10 years in engineering & delivery across demanding environments.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.intro: Need help with QA, DevOps, or Data? A project to structure? Tell us about your context. We'll get back to you within 48 hours.
contact.name: Your name
contact.subject: Select a subject

subjectHints.qa: Describe your software quality, testing, or automation needs.
subjectHints.devops: Describe your CI/CD, infrastructure, or cloud needs.
subjectHints.data: Describe your data pipeline or governance needs.

contact.success: Thank you. We'll get back to you within 48 hours.
contact.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

seo.title: Quorexis — Engineering & Delivery Excellence | QA, DevOps, Data
seo.description: French IT consultancy specializing in Quality Engineering, DevOps, and Data Engineering. We structure and deliver your critical tech projects.
